channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Trump says Iran’s ‘had regime change’ as he describes ‘boatloads of oil’
item.description: US President Donald Trump says the US-Israeli war on Iran has effectively brought ‘regime change’.

item.title: IAEA says Iran’s Khondab heavy water reactor no longer operational
item.description: The UN’s nuclear watchdog says Iran’s Khondab heavy water production plant is no longer operational.

item.title: Iranian academic describes US-Israeli attacks on Iran’s universities
item.description: Doutaghi says the attack reflects a wider pattern and raises questions about what defines ‘legitimate retaliation'.

item.title: Oil tops $116 a barrel as Iran accuses US of preparing invasion
item.description: Crude prices continue to climb as world faces its biggest energy crisis in decades.

item.title: Iranian attack damages Kuwait power and desalination plant, kills worker
item.description: Kuwaiti authorities say Indian worker killed in attack that also caused 'significant material damage' to building.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump says wants to take Iran’s oil; Kuwait power site hit
item.description: Kuwait says an Indian worker has been killed in an Iranian raid as attacks across the Gulf continue.

item.title: How will the Houthis’ involvement shape the war?
item.description: The Yemeni group has launched missiles towards Israel in support of Iran.

item.title: Iran accuses US of plotting ground attack, as Israel steps up bombardment
item.description: Power being restored after Iran's Ministry of Energy reported outages in the capital, Tehran following attacks.

item.title: IRGC spokesperson says Trump ‘only understands the language of force’
item.description: IRGC spokesperson Ebrahim Zolfaghari dismisses threats of US ground operations.

item.title: Qatari TV station hit in Iran
item.description: Qatar’s Al Araby network condemns an attack on its office in Tehran, which injured at least 10 people.
